en-us.title: Catch the Drift
en-us.description: Itoro swung her massive brush through the air, scattering droplets of ink around her before striking the ground with force. The black liquid traced shapes on the stone, seeped into the cracks, stained the cobblestones, and from these obsidian strokes sprang countless soot sparrows. They flapped their wings - pulsing masses of dark pigment - before flying off into the distance, each carrying a message, a summons.
en-us.html:
• Tales

    over 1 year ago8 minutes

    Catch the Drift

    Itoro swung her massive brush through the air, scattering droplets of ink around her before striking the ground with force. The black liquid traced shapes on the stone, seeped into the cracks, stained the cobblestones, and from these obsidian strokes sprang countless soot sparrows. They flapped their wings - pulsing masses of dark pigment - before flying off into the distance, each carrying a message, a summons.

fr-fr.title: Namkha
fr-fr.description: Les feuilles pleuvent autour de moi, telle une nuée rosée tombant de la canopée. Je les regarde danser, se heurter, reprendre leur valse indolente avant de se poser sur le sol moussu. J'en saisis une, observe les veines blanchâtres qui parcourent sa surface.
fr-fr.html:
• Récits

    il y a plus d’un an8 minutes

    Namkha

    Les feuilles pleuvent autour de moi, telle une nuée rosée tombant de la canopée. Je les regarde danser, se heurter, reprendre leur valse indolente avant de se poser sur le sol moussu. J'en saisis une, observe les veines blanchâtres qui parcourent sa surface.
